entry.title: the art of floriography
entry.summary:
Author: cosmetics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,938Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 131

Summary: buck starts receiving flowers. one bouquet, left carefully at his door, with a small card explaining exactly what it means. then another the next day. and another. each one different but just as deliberate as the last. it’s probably nothing (or a language of love and flowers)

entry.title: Is it love or are we just friends with tension?
entry.summary:
Author: Val_in_a_trenchcoat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,744Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 176

Summary: “Eddie…” The word is soft, small, and still just a little too rough. A small inhale of air comes from Buck as he prepares his next words. Eddie holds his breath. “Have you ever heard of… gay chicken?”Or: Eddie Diaz and the sexuality crisis he's not having, but Buck thinks he should have. For science!

entry.title: linking trunks
entry.summary:
Author: beetlesandstars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,763Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 45

Summary: “I’m a normal size.” “No,” Buck says, insistent. “It’s— it’s thick, Eddie. Like— a real handful thick.” Eddie ducks his head, swallowing hard. “I’m a— grower. By your definition. It gets bigger.” Buck is still staring at him. Eddie does not look back. “Like an inch bigger?” Grabbing his beer from the table, Eddie takes the last sip, hoping the chill of it will be some kind of cool balm over the flames within. It doesn’t help much. Quietly, he answers, “More.” Buck gasps, loud and theatrical. “More?” “Yes. Alright?” Eddie says tightly, his body flushes hotly. “More.” A long second ticks by. Abruptly and a little loudly, Buck asks, “Eddie, how big is your cock?”Or: Buck finds out Eddie is hung. Seriously hung. This is mindblowing information to possess, apparently.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I will rescue you
entry.summary:
Author: bisexu_el

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,921Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 194

Summary: “Where’s Buck?” “I’m sorry, Mr Diaz, where’s who?” “My husband, Evan Buckley-Diaz. He was in the car with me, he should be here, where is he?” “Mr Diaz, you’ve sustained a serious concussion, your CT ruled out inter-cranial bleeding but some confusion is normal” “No, no, I’m not confused, my husband was in the car with me when we crashed. Is he okay? Is he here? He’s pregnant, I need to see him” “Mr Diaz, no one was in the car with you when the rescue team pulled you out” —————— Or, the events of the Nashville cross over and 9x13: Mother’s boy, but with one vital difference, Buck is pregnant.

entry.title: Somewhere Between Silence And You
entry.summary:
Author: madeofscratch28

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,897Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 14

Summary: There are a thousand things Buck wants to say to Eddie, and none of them ever come out right.So they settle into silence instead, into borrowed touches and almost-confessions, into a gravity neither of them seems willing to name.It’s not nothing.It’s just… not spoken.

entry.title: love will call (love will make you fit it all in the car)
entry.summary:
Author: beetlesandstars

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,178Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 130

Summary: Eddie Diaz: father, veteran, firefighter, gay. It’s that easy. A descriptor, a word that Eddie’s spent his entire life running from.It’s a fucking relief to realise now that he’s stopped running. The burn in his muscles will linger, but it’s okay. It will serve as a reminder of how far he’s come.Beside him, Buck huffs a laugh. “I can’t believe you did a honky tonk dance.”Eddie laughs, startled. “I can’t believe you didn’t."Or: on the drive back to Los Angeles, Eddie works up the courage to tell Buck the truth.

entry.title: wikihow to be normal about your best friend
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,940Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 122

Summary: This is all perfectly applicable to friendship. Friendships require effort. Intentionality. Sometimes you have to watch a minute long Instagram video about attracting men to figure out how to get your male best friend to come back to your house and fall asleep on your couch again. Or in your bed. Either one. Whatever Buck's comfortable with. Eddie's not picky. Eddie will take whatever proximity Buck is willing to offer and be grateful for it, and if that sounds desperate then fine, it's a little desperate, but it's friend-desperate, which is a completely different thing than regular desperate. He replays the video and takes mental notes, formulating a plan that is simple: get Buck's attention. Spend more time with Buck. Stop feeling like his ribcage has been hollowed out with a melon baller every time he goes forty-eight hours without hearing Buck laugh. Easy and straightforward. He’s got this. Or,Five times Eddie tries to show Buck how much he misses him; plus the one time he just says it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Buckle Up and Drive Me Crazy
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,131Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 43

Summary: "Just a sec," Eddie says, setting his hand on the driver's side door. "I'll be right back." Before Buck even has the chance to get his own seatbelt off, Eddie has hopped out of the truck, closed the door, and locked it. Buck freezes. He watches Eddie wide-eyed through the windshield. Eddie just locked him in the truck. Buck is trapped in here. Alone. With nothing but his sweating palms and straining bladder.Buck and Eddie road trip back from a hike and things get a little out of control.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Already His (Buck)
entry.summary:
Author: edsawrites

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,880Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 37

Summary: “Okay, hold on,” Karen says, snapping back into focus. “Let me get this straight. Your plan is to just come out to Buck and… hope he connects the dots?” Eddie shrugs, like it’s the most reasonable thing in the world. “I mean, yeah. I don’t feel like overexplaining it.” He gestures to his face. “Also, I have big, beautiful brown eyes.” Hen and Karen share a look. It’s going to be a disaster. It’s going to be very entertaining. And, either way, they’re definitely going to end up together. So really, why not enjoy the show? or After a long-overdue realization about his sexuality, Eddie is ready to embrace what he thinks has been obvious all along: he and Buck are already something more than friends. Buck, however, is left reeling, forced to confront the fact that the only boundary he believed existed between them is suddenly gone. While Eddie moves forward like nothing needs to be said, and makes his own assumptions, the rest of the 118 watches it all unfold—fully aware, highly entertained, and absolutely unwilling to intervene.

entry.title: Learning To Stay
entry.summary:
Author: FandomWork101

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,366Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 403

Summary: Buck knows the 118 is his family. They have been with him through so much. But when everyone goes home, it is Buck left by himself. Buck decides he wants to change that. He decides that he wants to create his own family. One that doesn’t leave. One that stays. So Buck adopts a dog. But that leads to some jealousy from the Diaz family as they feel this dog is taking all of Buck’s time.

entry.title: some things stay
entry.summary:
Author: literalmetaphor

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,545Chapters: 13/17Kudos: 122

Summary: “You gotta be pretty desperate to take a job like this, especially with a kid.” “Why’s that?” Eddie’s face flickers through a dozen almost-expression, like hail against a window pane, never quite breaking through. Buck ticks the reason off on his fingers. “You got a ghost story looming over everything. No civilization for miles. The place is old and dark and, well, let’s be honest—creepy. The proprietor is an obvious drunk. That enough for you?” Eddie scoffs. “You forgot to mention the incredibly off-putting gardener.” Buck definitely does not smile. “That too.” Then, “So, I figure there’s something equally wrong with you.” -- A loose Bly Manor AU.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
